channel.title: Remote on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Remote on TLDRBins

item.title: evil-winrm
item.description: Connect by password evil-winrm -i 127.0.0.1 -u username -p password Connect by hash evil-winrm -i 10.10.11.10 -u username -H <HASH> Connect by kerberos sudo ntpdate -s 10.10.11.10 && evil-winrm -i dc.example.com -r EXAMPLE.COM Connect by .crt and .key evil-winrm -i example.com -S -k auth.key -c auth.crt
